heading: Agricultural biotechnology research and development for developing countries
label: 7631 Agricultural biotechnology research and development for developing countries

children.label: A
children.text: an institution of higher education that offers a curriculum in agriculture or the biosciences;

children.label: C
children.text: a consortium of for-profit institutions and agricultural research institutions.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary (acting through the Foreign Agricultural Service) shall establish and administer a program to make competitive grants to eligible entities to develop agricultural biotechnology for developing countries.

children.label: A
children.text: enhance the nutritional content of agricultural products that can be grown in developing countries;

children.label: B
children.text: increase the yield and safety of agricultural products that can be grown in developing countries;

children.label: C
children.text: increase the yield of agricultural products that are drought- and stress-resistant and that can be grown in developing countries;

children.label: D
children.text: extend the growing range of crops that can be grown in developing countries;

children.label: E
children.text: enhance the shelf-life of fruits and vegetables grown in developing countries;

children.label: F
children.text: develop environmentally sustainable agricultural products that can be grown in developing countries; and

children.label: G
children.text: develop vaccines to immunize against life-threatening illnesses and other medications that can be administered by consuming genetically-engineered agricultural products.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: c Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary to carry out this section for each of fiscal years 2002 through 2012.
